name: grailed-plus
description: Chrome-first MV3 beta for Grailed Plus

scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs chrome
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs firefox
scripts.release:chrome: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run zip:chrome
scripts.release:firefox: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run zip:firefox && npm run verify:firefox
